title: Overwhelmed
author: Brigid Schulte
subline: How to work, love, and play when no one has the time.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A clock face: 24 hour marks around a circle. Some are highlighted as WORK (ash), some as LOVE (ash), some as PLAY (ash), some as REST (red — the only one). Most are full. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1100)" fill="none">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="380" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="320" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
    <!-- 24 hour ticks, label a few -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2">
      <line x1="0" y1="-380" x2="0" y2="-340"/>
      <line x1="190" y1="-329" x2="170" y2="-294"/>
      <line x1="329" y1="-190" x2="294" y2="-170"/>
      <line x1="380" y1="0" x2="340" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="329" y1="190" x2="294" y2="170"/>
      <line x1="190" y1="329" x2="170" y2="294"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="380" x2="0" y2="340"/>
      <line x1="-190" y1="329" x2="-170" y2="294"/>
      <line x1="-329" y1="190" x2="-294" y2="170"/>
      <line x1="-380" y1="0" x2="-340" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="-329" y1="-190" x2="-294" y2="-170"/>
      <line x1="-190" y1="-329" x2="-170" y2="-294"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 12 sectors representing 24 hours filled with quadrants labeled W/L/P/R -->
    <g fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.45" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" text-anchor="middle">
      <text x="0" y="-100">WORK</text>
      <text x="100" y="0">LOVE</text>
      <text x="0" y="120">PLAY</text>
      <text x="-100" y="0">REST</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Three sectors are crowded with small dots (work, love, play). REST is empty until we add a single red dot. -->
    <g fill="#cccccc">
      <!-- Work -->
      <circle cx="-50" cy="-120" r="2"/><circle cx="-30" cy="-100" r="2"/><circle cx="-10" cy="-130" r="2"/><circle cx="20" cy="-110" r="2"/><circle cx="40" cy="-90" r="2"/><circle cx="60" cy="-110" r="2"/><circle cx="-50" cy="-80" r="2"/><circle cx="-30" cy="-60" r="2"/><circle cx="50" cy="-70" r="2"/><circle cx="-15" cy="-100" r="2"/>
      <!-- Love -->
      <circle cx="80" cy="-30" r="2"/><circle cx="100" cy="-10" r="2"/><circle cx="120" cy="-30" r="2"/><circle cx="90" cy="10" r="2"/><circle cx="110" cy="30" r="2"/><circle cx="130" cy="10" r="2"/><circle cx="80" cy="40" r="2"/><circle cx="100" cy="50" r="2"/>
      <!-- Play -->
      <circle cx="-30" cy="80" r="2"/><circle cx="-10" cy="100" r="2"/><circle cx="20" cy="80" r="2"/><circle cx="50" cy="100" r="2"/><circle cx="-50" cy="110" r="2"/><circle cx="-20" cy="130" r="2"/><circle cx="10" cy="140" r="2"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The single RED dot — REST, the missing piece -->
    <circle cx="-100" cy="0" r="9" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <circle cx="-100" cy="0" r="22" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <!-- 12, 6, 3, 9 labels -->
    <g fill="#4c4c4c" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" text-anchor="middle">
      <text x="0" y="-410">12</text>
      <text x="0" y="430">6</text>
      <text x="410" y="0">3</text>
      <text x="-410" y="0">9</text>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A 24-hour clock divided into four quadrants: WORK, LOVE, PLAY, REST. The first three are crowded with ash dots. REST has a single red dot — the missing piece. 480px uppercase title sits at the bottom, broken as OVER-WHELMED. The book made visible: life is full, rest is empty.
